title: ODS Branch Naming
description: Schema for validating branch names against the Open Delivery Spec Branch Naming standard (v1.0.0). Extends Conventional Branch 1.0.0.

type.description: Branch type prefix. Aliases (feat, fix) are accepted but canonical names (feature, bugfix) are preferred.

description.description: Branch description in kebab-case. No consecutive hyphens, no leading/trailing hyphens. Dots allowed only for release version segments.

ticket.description: Optional issue tracker ticket ID (e.g., PROJ-1234).

ai_generated.description: Whether this branch was created by an AI agent.

ai_tool.description: Name of the AI tool that generated this branch (required if ai_generated is true).

base_branch.description: The trunk branch this branch was created from.
